races.description: Versatile and adaptable, humans thrive in all disciplines and form the backbone of most civilizations.
races.racialBonus: +5% XP gain, +1 to all base stats

races.description: Ancient and graceful, elves possess an innate affinity for magic and exceptional agility.
Stout and resilient, dwarves are master craftsmen and formidable warriors underground.
Fearsome and powerful, orcs channel raw fury into devastating melee attacks.
Risen from the grave, the undead are immune to many debuffs and can consume life energy.
races.racialBonus: Undead immunity, Will of the Forsaken
